Reason_for_Visit.summary: 63 y.o. female with left ER+ breast cancer s/p bilateral mastectomies, adjuvant chemotherapy and currently treated with adjuvant letrozole.

Clinical_Findings.findings: Exam shows no evidence of recurrence.
Clinical_Findings.current_meds: letrozole, CHOLECALCIFEROL, VITAMIN D3, EXFORGE, ibuprofen, KLOR-CON 10, Resveratrol, FEMARA, hydrochlorothiazide

Current_Medications.current_meds: FEMARA, KLOR-CON 10, EXFORGE 5-160 mg, CHOLECALCIFEROL, VITAMIN D3

Treatment_Changes.recent_changes: Switched from generic to brand name letrozole due to GI symptoms.
supportive_meds: ibuprofen (ADVIL,MOTRIN), KLOR-CON 10, CHOLECALCIFEROL, VITAMIN D3, EXFORGE 5-160 mg

Treatment_Goals.current_meds: letrozole, CHOLECALCIFEROL, EXFORGE, ibuprofen, KLOR-CON, Resveratrol, FEMARA, hydrochlorothiazide

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: No evidence of disease recurrence on exam, stable symptoms
Response_Assessment.current_meds: letrozole, CHOLECALCIFEROL, VITAMIN D3, EXFORGE, ibuprofen, KLOR-CON 10, Resveratrol, FEMARA, hydrochlorothiazide

hormonal therapy.summary: Continue letrozole daily. Patient is risk adverse and would prefer to continue letrozole > 5 years

bone therapy.summary: Continue calcium and vitamin D daily

Genetic_Testing_Plan.genetic_testing_plan: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Referral.Nutrition: Discussed risk reduction with exercise, weight management, and limiting alcohol
